positive: A vibrant and intricate celestial forest scene featuring stylized silhouettes of bioluminescent flora, gentle glowing fauna (like whimsical hummingbirds and stylized deer), and ancient, gnarled roots forming a cosmic landscape. The overall composition is centralized and perfectly balanced, emphasizing clean lines and high contrast. Use deep indigo, cosmic violet, emerald green, and soft gold accents for glowing elements. Studio quality, graphic novel style meets digital painting, designed for a seamless all-over apparel print. Highly detailed, perfect symmetry, clean edges, rule of thirds composition.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, dirty, grungy, jpeg artifacts, poor anatomy, multiple subjects, extra limbs
